x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Business rules on incident and task tables can intercept or modify Now Assist API calls, causing unexpected behavior. Customer-created rules must be reviewed before enablement to prevent conflicts.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review customer-created Business Rules on incident and task. Test each in sub-production with Now Assist enabled. Disable or modify rules that intercept Now Assist API calls. Target: <50 custom active BRs on incident/task.
